name: stdout
text:
Set up: Chain  35 ; 1 stitch into each chain sp.,

Subsequent rows: Work the following stitches evenly around each subsequent row:

   Row    Stitch count
    0              35
    1              35
    2              37
    3              41
    4              45
    5              51
    6              57
    7              63
    8              69
    9              75
   10              80
   11              85
   12              88
   13              90
   14              91 

This completes the upper half of the torus.

For the lower half, turn work upside down and repeat Rows 1- 13 . Fill and sew up.
